gxio/mica.h File Reference

An API for allocating and manipulating MiCA hardware resources. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxio_mica_context_t
 A context object used to manage MiCA hardware resources. More...

Typedefs

typedef MICA_OPCODE_t gxio_mica_opcode_t
 A MiCA opcode, used for direct manipulation of a MiCA context.

Enumerations

enum  gxio_mica_accelerator_type_t { GXIO_MICA_ACCEL_CRYPTO, GXIO_MICA_ACCEL_COMP }
 Enum codes for the specific types of MiCA shims. More...
enum  gxio_mica_mem_flags_e { GXIO_MICA_MEM_FLAG_NT_HINT = IORPC_MEM_BUFFER_FLAG_NT_HINT }
 Flags that can be passed to memory registration functions. More...

Functions

int gxio_mica_init (gxio_mica_context_t *context, gxio_mica_accelerator_type_t type, int index)
 Initialize a context.
int gxio_mica_destroy (gxio_mica_context_t *context)
 Destroy a MiCA context.
int gxio_mica_register_page (gxio_mica_context_t *context, void *page, size_t page_size, unsigned int page_flags)
 Register a page in the context's IOTLB.
int gxio_mica_unregister_page (gxio_mica_context_t *context, void *page)
 Remove a page from the context's IOTLB.
int gxio_mica_cfg_completion_interrupt (gxio_mica_context_t *context, int cpu, int e)
 Configure an interrupt to be sent to a tile when an operation requested of a context has completed.
void gxio_mica_memcpy_start (gxio_mica_context_t *context, void *dst, void *src, int length)
 Copy from source memory to destination memory, using the DMA engine on a MiCA shim.
void gxio_mica_start_op (gxio_mica_context_t *context, void *src, void *dst, void *extra_data, gxio_mica_opcode_t opcode)
 Start a MiCA operation.
int gxio_mica_is_busy (gxio_mica_context_t *context)
 Poll for completion of a MiCA operation.

Detailed Description

An API for allocating and manipulating MiCA hardware resources.
